message:
test(http/h2): add edge case tests for HPACK codec

Improves HPACK test coverage with error path validation:

Integer decoding tests:
- test_integer_decode_empty: Empty input returns CompressionError
- test_integer_decode_truncated: Incomplete multi-byte sequence fails
- test_integer_decode_shift_overflow: Excessive continuation bytes fail

String decoding tests:
- test_string_decode_length_exceeds_buffer: Length > remaining fails
- test_string_decode_invalid_utf8: Invalid UTF-8 bytes fail

Huffman decoding tests:
- test_huffman_decode_invalid_padding: Wrong padding returns error

Also adds helper function assert_compression_error() for consistent
error checking across tests - validates both error occurrence and
correct ErrorCode::CompressionError variant.

These tests ensure the HPACK decoder properly rejects malformed input
per RFC 7541 requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
